zh.Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Coloni: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼
zh.lifeSummary: Henry Brooks於1592年出生在英國藍卡爾曼徹斯特。他於1622年與Mrs. Henry Brooks在英國藍卡爾曼徹斯特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1639年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼康可德。他去世於1683年4月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本享年91歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Henry Brooks于1592年出生在英国藍卡爾曼徹斯特。他于1622年与Mrs. Henry Brooks在英国藍卡爾曼徹斯特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1639年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼康可德。他去世于1683年4月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本享年91岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德。

nameMeanings.name: Brooks
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: usually a variant of Brook , with excrescent -s. The optional addition of -s, with no grammatical function, is usually post-medieval, but some examples of the same person's name occurring with and without -(e)s have been noted as early as the 14th century in South Lancashire. The -es in such cases probably has neither a plural nor a genitival function, and the name means ‘dweller at the brook’, not ‘dweller at the brooks’. A plural sense cannot be ruled out elsewhere, but a non-grammatical -(e)s must also be considered a strong possibility.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Brucks
meanings: probably a habitational name from Brucks (also Brux) which derives from Middle Low German brōk ‘low-lying marsh’.
reportedly also an altered form of Flemish (Dutch) Broex, an old variant of Broeks (see Brooks ).

variants.name: Brook
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a brook, stream, water-meadows or low, marshy ground, from Middle English brook, Old English brōc ‘brook, stream’; or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, such as Brook (Kent, Rutland) or Brooke (Norfolk).
North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a water meadow or marsh, from Low German brook (cognate with German Bruch ‘swamp’ and Old English brōc; see 1 above).
Americanized form of Dutch Broek: topographic name from broek, a cognate of 2 above.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Henry Brooks was born in 1592, in Manchester, Lancashire, England. He married Mrs. Henry Brooks in 1622, in Manchester, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He lived in Concord, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1639. He died on 12 April 1683, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 91, and was buried in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

Il a vécu à Concord, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1639. ja.lifeSummary: Henry Brooksは1592年にイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターで生まれた。1622年にイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターでMrs. Henry Brooksと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1639年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーコンコルドに住んでいた。彼は1683年4月12日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンで91歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスコンコルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Brooks(은)는 1592년 영국 랭카실르 먼체스터에서 태어났다. 그는 1622년 영국 랭카실르 먼체스터에서 Mrs. Henry Brooks(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1639년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 콘코르드에서 살았다. 그는 1683년 4월 12일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 콘코르드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Henry Brooks nasceu em 1592, em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Henry Brooks em 1622, em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele viveu em Concord, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1639. Ele faleceu em 12 de abril de 1683, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 91 anos, e foi sepultado em Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Henry Brooks родился в 1592 г. в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Henry Brooks в 1622 г. в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он жил в местности конкорд, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1639 году. Он умер 12 апреля 1683 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 91 год и был похоронен в местности конкорд, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Henry Brooks nació en 1592, en Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Mrs. Henry Brooks en 1622, en Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Vivió en Concord, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1639. Murió el 12 de abril de 1683, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 91 años, y fue sepultado en Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
